import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from scraper.scrapers.cervinia import scrape

snap = scrape\("cervinia"\)
print\(f"Source: {snap.source}"\)
print\(f"Error:  {snap.error}"\)
print\(f"Lifts:  {snap.lifts_open}/{snap.lifts_total} \({snap.pct_open}%\)"\)
print\(f"Pistes: {len\(snap.pistes\)}"\)
print\(\)

link_lifts = [l for l in snap.lifts if l.is_link]
print\(f"=== SUMMIT LINKS \({len\(link_lifts\)}\) ==="\)
for l in link_lifts:
    print\(f"  [{l.status.upper\(\):6}] {l.name}"\)

print\(f"\\n=== ALL LIFTS ==="\)
for l in sorted\(snap.lifts, key=lambda x: \(x.status, x.name\)\):
    print\(f"  [{l.status.upper\(\):6}] {'🔗' if l.is_link else '  '} {l.name}"\)
PYEOF)
